commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Jair the son of Manasseh went and took the small towns thereof, and called them Havothjair. Jair was born of Segub, the son of Esron, by a daughter of Machir, 1 Paralipomenon i. He did not remain in the tribe of Juda, but dwelt in that of his mother, (Calmet) or perhaps he married a descendant of Machir, and obtained these villages. (Selden, Suc. ) Havoth, means "a circle of cabins or shepherds' huts "in Arabic.
